parsing_rules.definition: Use single-column layouts. Avoid tables, text box shapes, graphics, or custom icons within body content. Use standard section headings (Skills, Experience, Education, Projects).
Format experience bullets using the Google XYZ formula: Accomplished [X], as measured by [Y], by doing [Z]. Put the outcome/impact first.
Distribute target keywords (e.g. PyTorch, Kubernetes) naturally inside experience bullet descriptions rather than just listing them in a flat skills block.
